message: Hey James - did you see my email about the Adatum meeting Thursday? Really need your help on the briefing deck. 🙏
Yes just saw it. I'll start pulling it together today. Do we have the latest ProLine S performance data from their deployment?
Yeah - 18.3% throughput improvement. Better than the 15% they asked for. That's our strongest proof point. I'll send the numbers in an email.
James - Spencer looped me in on the Adatum prep. I'll have the competitive slides done by Wednesday. Want me at the prep session Tuesday?
Absolutely, please join Tuesday at 9. Your Fabrikam analysis is going to be critical - they're our main competitor on this one.
FYI I'm sending you the notes from our January meeting with Adatum. Lisa Chen is the key decision maker - we should make sure the deck speaks to her priorities (speed to value, ROI).
James! Big news - engineering just confirmed ProLine X is ready for GA. June 9 target. Can you lead the launch plan? I'm sending details to the team.
That's great timing with the Adatum deal. Yes I'll own the launch plan. Let's use Thursday's kickoff to align everyone. Can you have the product highlights ready?
Already drafted them! 40% faster, built-in AI/ML, Azure IoT native, modular design. I'll send the full list in an email to the group.
Hey James - Molly's asking about the exec summary for the launch plan. How's it coming? Need it for the board update next week.
Started it but still need to fill in the milestones, risks, and budget sections. Going to try to finish it after the Thursday meetings.
If you can get a draft done by Friday EOD that would be perfect. I can help review and polish over the weekend. The board deck is due Monday.
